title: General Infrastructure SOP
solution: 1. Verify server health metrics. 2. Check hardware status via IPMI/iLO. 3. Review system logs. 4. Restart services if needed. 5. Escalate to hardware team if physical issue.

title: Application Incident SOP
solution: 1. Check application health endpoints. 2. Review recent deployments. 3. Check dependency services. 4. Analyze error logs. 5. Restart or rollback as appropriate.

title: Database Operations SOP
solution: 1. Check database status and replication lag. 2. Review slow query log. 3. Check storage and memory. 4. Verify backup status. 5. Engage DBA team if needed.

title: Cloud Infrastructure SOP
solution: 1. Check cloud provider status page. 2. Review resource quotas and limits. 3. Check IAM permissions. 4. Review recent infrastructure changes. 5. Scale resources if needed.
